column215: Digital recharge: The CM incorrectly handled a successful payment/failed recharge scenario by immediately directing the customer to bKash. According to the proper modality, the CM should have first verified the transaction status in the POL GUI. Since the payment was successful but the recharge failed, the agent's responsibility was to explain the automatic refund process and provide the specific timelines—24 hours for bKash and 7 working days for other providers. A complaint should only be raised if those timelines have passed or if the refund status remains blank in the system.

customer reported an inability to send SMS. The CM incorrectly informed the customer that they had reached an "SMS limit" and would need to wait until February 1st for a reset. The CM failed to distinguish between bundle SMS limits and main account balance usage, leading to a complete service denial.



SMS limit (e.g., 500 SMS per day or monthly 2000) applies specifically to bundle packs/offers.  There is no such restriction on sending SMS using the main account balance. CM needs to follow SMS connectivity guideline.
